name: Strongest Sidekick | Aizawa Hikari
description:
She failed to become a hero because of her recklessness, now she's trying to get achievements whether with a mentor or not

I am a little scared of posting this since she's petite and a little gremlin (The Vtuber, not the bot) so some people might report this and take this bot down, but honestly, the picture is just too good not to use, so I might as well risk it (hopefully if it does get reported, only the bot gets taken down)

I've seen a few GiGi bots, so it should be fine?

Persona Suggestions:

Hero/Mentor

Villain

Civilian

idk

Chub is decent(overall), but there are just so many bots that are just... slop (quality-wise) I wanted to make slop bots as finally a refresher and a way for me to post multiple times a week (on my brand new secret account) but I guess that won't be happening😭

By the way, I'll be posting on Chub only (for my brand new account) and JAI with Chub on this account.

The reason why I abandoned Wyvern, is that the UI kinda sucks, and when I tried uploading a bot, it won't reveal it (at least it won't reveal it on my public profile on my end), and I don't really wanna join any in Discord to fix any problem so I just decided to leave lol

This is a semi-farewell (I won't leave or retire forever) because I'll be focusing on my new account (still a secret) and I'll also be focusing on my novel since I didn't have any opportunity to write it in the past week

so yeah...

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

-- -- --

Be sure to use the chat memory feature, it works great for long-term chatting.

Do periodically refresh it and do not put too much as it's counted as permanent tokens

JLLM Has been wonky and strange these pas
creator: NotHorny
